subcodes.first_line: O ye who are holding fast unto the Covenant and Testament! This day, from the realms of the All-Glorious, from the Kingdom of Holiness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسکین بعهد و پیمان الهی الیوم اهل ملا اعلی از ملکوت ابهی ناظر و از جبروت
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @importance of community building, @the concourse on high, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @unity of thought and belief
